# truenas_user (Data Source)

Provides information about a user on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_user" "root" {
  username = "root"
}

output "root_uid" {
  value = data.truenas_user.root.uid
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String) The username to look up.

### Read-Only

- `builtin` (Boolean) Whether this is a built-in system user.
- `email` (String) The user email address.
- `full_name` (String) The full name of the user.
- `gid` (Number) The primary group GID.
- `home` (String) The home directory.
- `id` (Number) The user ID.
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the user account is locked.
- `shell` (String) The login shell.
- `smb` (Boolean) Whether the user has SMB access.
- `uid` (Number) The UNIX UID.
